scripts.build: npm run build -w @coderage-labs/armada-shared && npm run build -w @coderage-labs/armada-node && npm run build -w @coderage-labs/armada-control && npm run build -w @coderage-labs/armada-ui
scripts.dev: concurrently -n node,api,ui -c yellow,blue,green "npm run dev -w @coderage-labs/armada-node" "npm run dev -w @coderage-labs/armada-control" "npm run dev -w @coderage-labs/armada-ui"
